hero.title:
Start Your Adventure
With
SiPetualang
hero.subtitle: Rent mountain and camping equipment safely. We match the gear to your destination's conditions. Check stock availability in real-time and book hassle-free.

information.title: Why Choose SiPetualang?
information.description: SiPetualang is an outdoor gear rental platform connecting gear owners with adventurers
information.qualityDesc: All gear passes standard checks before rental
information.affordableDesc: Rent premium gear at budget-friendly rates
information.easyDesc: Book, pay, and pick up gear in minutes
information.infoTitle:
Outdoor Gear Rental
Now Made Easy!
information.infoDesc: SiPetualang is a trusted outdoor gear rental platform that makes it easy to enjoy nature adventures without buying expensive equipment. From tents, sleeping bags, to complete hiking gear.

howItWorks.title:
How SiPetualang
Works
howItWorks.subtitle: We designed a streamlined lending system that protects both parties. Follow these four steps to start your journey.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find your favorite gear from various trusted categories and brands.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Set the start date and rental duration that fits your schedule.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Pick up at the nearest partner store. Must submit physical ID as a guarantee.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Return the gear in good condition and retrieve your ID.

category.title:
Outdoor Gear Rental
Now Made Easy
category.subtitle: Just type your destination name. Our system recommends the right gear for the conditions there. You can check tent or carrier availability in real-time.

testimonial.title:
